base_url = 'https://staging-cleanup-app-fn2i.encr.app'

    def test_insert_stale_record(base_url):
        url = f"{base_url}/records"
        payload = {
            "id": "stale-1",
            "data": "old data",
            "created_at": "2020-01-01T00:00:00Z"
        }
        response = requests.post(url, json=payload, timeout=10)
>       assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to insert stale record. Status: {response.status_code}, Body: {response.text}"
E       AssertionError: Failed to insert stale record. Status: 500, Body: Error: Encore application not found
E       assert 500 == 200
E        +  where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
